ocr.text: Marine Bryozoa of Greece: an annotated checklist 41
Table 1.
Questionable taxa reported from Greece not included in the present checklist.
Species and authority as First report from Greece Remarks
given in the source
Adeonella polystomella Harmelin (1969) Omitted following Rosso and Novosel (2010).
(Reuss, 1847)
Cribrilina annulata (Fabricius, Castritsi-Catharios and Questionable (see Rosso and Di Martino 2016).
Cribrilina punctata (Hassall, Castritsi-Catharios and Possibly confused with Collarina balzaci (see Rosso
1841) Marcopoulou-Diacantoni and Di Martino 2016).
Escharina porosa (Smitt) Hayward (1974) Removed after the splitting of a previous complex of
species (see Berning et al. 2008). Examination of
material is needed.
Hippodiplosia delicatula Castritsi-Catharios et al. Possibly an exclusively fossil species.
Manzoni (1986)
Microecia suborbicularis Castritsi-Catharios et al. The material for this species needs further examination
(Hincks) (1986) (see Rosso et al. 2010).
Monoporella ﬁmbriata Harmelin (1969), Hayward Replaced by M. bouchardii following Harmelin (2014a).
carinifera Canu & Bassler, (1974)
1929 and M. nodulifera
(Hincks)
Parasmittina nitida Verrill Castritsi-Catharios et al. Species restricted to the SW Atlantic (Winston and
Pentapora foliacea Hayward (1974) Species restricted to the North Atlantic (see Lombardi
et al. 2010 and Rosso et al. 2010).
? Rhyncozoon lobulatum Harmelin (1969) This species name is likely to refer to an aged portion of
(Waters, 1879) R. digitatum (see Zabala and Maluquer 1988).
Schizomavella gardensis Castritsi-Catharios et al. A fossil species described from the Burdigalian of
(1986) France.
Scrupocellaria reptans Hayward (1974) Species restricted to the British Isles (see Rosso and Di
Martino 2016 and references therein). All records from
the Mediterranean (except for specimens from
Alexandria attributed to C. aegyptiaca) need to be
examined.
Sertella scbuermanni Jullien Castritsi-Catharios et al. This fossil species is reported only from its type locality
(1986) (Miocene of west Germany).
Tricellaria peachii Osburn Castritsi-Catharios et al. Species restricted to the North Atlantic. Could be
(1986) misidentiﬁed with Tricellaria inopinata.
Tubulipora phalangea Antoniadou and Species restricted to the Boreo-Arctic Atlantic Ocean
(Couch, 1844) Chintiroglou (2005) (see Rosso and Di Martino 2016).
Turbicellepora armata Castritsi-Catharios et al. This species is restricted to the North Atlantic.
(1985a), Castritsi-
Catharios et al. (1985b)
Turbicellepora redoutei Harmelin (1969) Species seemingly restricted to the Indo-Paciﬁc. It was
(Audouin, 1826) recorded only once in the Mediterranean.
